✦ My Favourite Daily Quote
To the One Self we all share.
To each and every soul that I have met along my journey.
To those in every corner of the world who have touched my life.
And to those who have not yet crossed paths.
To my brother JP, my grandparents, P.P. & Jens (two real life angels), my friends at On Purpose
Sandy Levey-Lundén, Clearmind, Duane O’Kane, and also Sharon.
To the Circle of Atonement, the Foundation for Inner Peace,
and to Helen Schucman and Bill Thetford.
To Him Who sent me.
I say thank you.
Compiled with love by Steven Gauvin

Years of studying, learning, and making mistakes — all of it distilled into something I can carry in my pocket. This is a Course in Miracles, made personal. — Steven Gauvin, Copenhagen
